title: DBobbyClient
body: # Welcome to the DBobbyClient This is a fabric modpack containing what I would consider essentials The DBobbyClient's main purpose is to have a small, fun modpack available to groups of friends, that provides a vanilla-like experience, while still allowing for a fresh adventure. ## Multiplayer One can host a server using the DBobbyClient modpack or host a world directly in-game using Essential Mod's friend menus (they are wonderful). It is also possible to join multiplayer servers without the modpack, such as Hypixel, and your game should run fine. Although I haven't run into any issues, you must use at your own risk of being banned from popular servers.
